title: Its all the Little Things that make the Difference
display_title: Its all the Little Things that make the Difference
wikitext:
[]: It's all the Little Things that make the Difference.             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 8:24 am Everyone has a few moments when watching Eva that just make you laugh your ass off. And it's always the little things, which no one else probably finds funny, but for you it just made that episode the best. Well here are mine. There are two of them, but there damn funny. 1. In episode 9, right after the Angel made its first attack and Shinji says to Kaji Shinji: Where's Misato? Kaji: Clearing things up. The person in charge must take responsibility. Right then the camera cuts to Misato and you see her eyes moving like this I laughed my ass off for ages with that one. 2. In episode 17 where Kaji is talking to Shinji in the canteen area. Kaji: So, can I buy you a drink? Cup O Tea. Shinji: Kaji, I'm a boy! Ohhh man. There's tears coming to my eyes I'm laughing so hard. So share with us the episode that made you laugh so hard that you started to fart uncontrollably until your friend sitting beside you said "For fuck sake man, what's the matter with you...... :shock: oh Jesus man, that's disgusting. It smells like something died inside of ya. :x Get the fucking airfreshner man." So you stagger off to get the airfreshner still laughing so much that you're jaw hurts, but when you come back the methane in the room has already outnumbered the oxygen 2:1. So you try to catch your breath but you can't, cause you're still laughing hysterically to the point where no oxygen is going to you're brain. Consequently you pass out, only to wake up an hour later with no recollection of what happened, so you watch the episode again, only to be caught up in a loop of farting.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat May 28, 2005 8:49 am My favorite funniest moment in the whole series is the one that goes with my avvie - #26 Alternate Universe Rei: "Who are you, and why are you defending him? Are you two doing it ?!" edit: It never made me fart, tho, as far as I'm aware...

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 8:53 am Yeah. Rei says something really funny. It was something like "are you rideing his Pony" I can't quite remember.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sat May 28, 2005 8:57 am DirtyHamster wrote: Yeah. Rei says something really funny. It was something like "are you rideing his Pony" I can't quite remember.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 9:01 am That would be the only time where I would agree with them adding in there own words :P

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 28, 2005 9:50 am It just has to be episode #08, Kaji's infamous line Ryouji: Tell me, is she still so wild .... in bed?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 9:57 am Yeah. And the best thing I think is that Shinji replies

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 10:14 am Oooh oooh oooh. This deserves another post. Can I change my favourite moment? Eva Monkey: Yes you may. DirtyHamster: Sucker! Mine is now when Touji gives Asuka her change back in ep.8 . That was the last thing I expected.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat May 28, 2005 12:35 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Oooh oooh oooh. This deserves another post. Can I change my favourite moment? Eva Monkey: Yes you may. DirtyHamster: Sucker! Mine is now when Touji gives Asuka her change back in ep.8 . That was the last thing I expected.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 12:40 pm Soluzar wrote: But not as funny as Sokodei's version.

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat May 28, 2005 1:04 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Soluzar wrote: But not as funny as Sokodei's version.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 1:16 pm Ahh well. Don't worry about it man. I know you tried your best.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sat May 28, 2005 2:35 pm My favorate funny scene is when Shinji is laying on top of Rei after her shower, his hand fermly grasping her boob. Rei: " Will you get off . . "

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 2:52 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Excuse my ignorance :oops: but what's this version you talk about?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 2:55 pm Reichu wrote: Asuka: Is that a toothpick in your pocket, or are you just poorly endowed? Toji: DUDE! Why don't you pick your teeth with THIS?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun May 29, 2005 1:58 am Ep#10: Asuka:In my case, do you think my breasts might get bigger when they're warmed? Shinji on't ask me, I've no idea! Asuka:You're such a boring little boy! Misato: Toss the body shampoo over to us. Asuka: The one we brought ran out. Shinji: Okay. Here it comes! Asuka: Roger! Shinji: ?? Asuka: Ouch!Stupid! Watch your aim! Clumsy boy! Shinji: Sorry... Asuka: Don't hit me on that part. Ep#9: Asuka:Listen Third,this is the unbreakable wall of Jerico. Shinji: What? Asuka:If you invade my side over this wall, you shall be executed. A child must not be awake late at night. Go to bed! Ep#8:Asuka: Thought noise. I told you not to disturb me. Shinji: What did I do? Asuka: You think in Japanese, right? Just think in German. Shinji: All right... Ba-- baumkuuhen... Asuka: Idiot! Fine, stop trying. And of course my two fav lines :Who do Japanese sleep on the floor? Unbelievable! And why are Japanese people so reckless?How can you can live in a room without a lock? Unbelievable! These all gave me a good laughing time!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 5:41 am Oooh, I got another sweet moment. In ep11 when all of Nerv has no power and Fuyutsuki & Gendo are at their desk with just a candel and all they can say to each other is Fuyutsuki: It's hot! Gendo: Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Sun May 29, 2005 8:29 am DirtyHamster wrote: Oooh, I got another sweet moment. In ep11 when all of Nerv has no power and Fuyutsuki & Gendo are at their desk with just a candel and all they can say to each other is Fuyutsuki: It's hot! Gendo: Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 29, 2005 11:38 am DirtyHamster wrote: Oooh, I got another sweet moment. In ep11 when all of Nerv has no power and Fuyutsuki & Gendo are at their desk with just a candel and all they can say to each other is Fuyutsuki: It's hot! Gendo: Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Sun May 29, 2005 11:39 pm Episode 7: Shinji was lying on bed after lost the first fight against the "fortresslike" Angel, Rei came in, reading out the manual and giving infomations to prepare him on the "Positron Biggun Operation", listening to Rei all in a sudden Shinji jumped up from the bed (with no clothes on him), his blanket fell down because of this and everything above his thighs are visible (Shinji didn't notice at all), then Rei said something very funny with a strange expression on her face:"Can you not show up your body?"(I guess that's what she said), hearing this gave Shinji a huge embaressment. Episode 8: Asuka and Shinji are both sitting in Eva-02 in fighting with the huge fishlike Angel, where the orthers are preety much just onlooking the fight. After Eva-02 was dragged into underneath sea by the Angel the cable that connects it with the aircraft carrier ran out of length and while being pulled violently it brushed down all the jets landing on the carrier into the sea, it seemed like at this moment Asuka and Shinji's lives are at stake, and everyone should be thinking about them since they disapeared with Eva-02 in the sea, but I'd never expect at that time someone like Kensuke would say: "What a waste of money!" ( no doubt he's a military fan, but he probably didn't know how much an Eva would cost in dollars) 8)

In episode 9, right after the Angel made its first attack and Shinji says to Kaji Shinji: Where's Misato? Kaji: Clearing things up. The person in charge must take responsibility. Episode 8: Asuka and Shinji are both sitting in Eva-02 in fighting with the huge fishlike Angel, where the orthers are preety much just onlooking the fight. After Eva-02 was dragged into underneath sea by the Angel the cable that connects it with the aircraft carrier ran out of length and while being pulled violently it brushed down all the jets landing on the carrier into the sea, it seemed like at this moment Asuka and Shinji's lives are at stake, and everyone should be thinking about them since they disapeared with Eva-02 in the sea, but I'd never expect at that time someone like Kensuke would say: "What a waste of money!"
